title: Multicolor Round Fruit Gel Ice Pack - 1 Count - Assorted Designs - Perfect for Lunch Boxes & Coolers
features: FUN DESIGNS: Add a refreshing touch to your lunchbox or cooler with our round fruit gel ice packs, featuring a vibrant assortment of watermelon, kiwi, and orange designs that will brighten up any mealtime.
REUSABLE & DURABLE: Made from top-quality materials, our round fruit gel ice packs are long-lasting and can be used repeatedly, making them a practical and environmentally friendly cooling solution.
SAFE & NON-TOXIC: Rest assured that our ice packs consist of a non-toxic gel, making them safe for daily use in direct contact with food. Enjoy a worry-free and fresh meal experience with every use.

COMPACT: Measuring at just the perfect size for lunch boxes and coolers, these fruit-inspired ice packs ensure your food stays fresh and cool while taking up minimal space; ideal for school lunches, picnics, work, and traveling.
EFFICIENT TEMPERATURE RETENTION: Say goodbye to soggy sandwiches and warm drinks as these ice packs provide superior cooling performance, keeping your food and beverages chilled for hours on end.
description: Introducing the multicolor round fruit gel ice pack, available in an assortment of unique designs. This 1-count pack is the perfect accessory for lunch boxes and coolers. Our product is designed to maintain a cool temperature, ensuring that your food and drinks stay fresh for longer. Compact yet efficient, it's ideal for everyday use. Whether it's a picnic, a day at work, or a school lunch, this gel ice pack is an essential companion that adds a touch of fun with its fruit-inspired designs.
